summary: Plan-only PR remediation shard. No GitHub mutations are planned directly. Four hydrated linked security-sensitive refs are quarantined with scoped route_security actions. None of the open candidate PRs has complete merge preflight proof, so no merge_candidate action is emitted. Candidate PRs with clear repair blockers cannot safely remain fix_needed because the result has no complete executable fix_artifact; those items are downgraded to scoped needs_human with exact blocker evidence.
